items.name_en: Dior 1:1 Counter Authentic Top-tier Imported Original Cowhide Suede (D-Journey) Black
items.name_cn:
Dior 1:1 Counter Authentic Top-tier Imported Original Cowhide Suede (D-Journey) Black
This D-Journey handbag is a new arrival for the season, debuting at the Dior 2025 Spring/Summer Couture Show. It features a soft texture and a modern reinterpretation of the dumpling bag silhouette. Crafted from suede cowhide, it is embellished with flat oversized woven trim stitching, reinterpreting Dior's classic pattern. The main compartment includes a zip pocket, and two side pockets with large leather zip pulls, adorned with a vintage gold-finished metal Christian Dior Paris logo, making it convenient for storing various daily small items. The small size comes with an adjustable top handle and leather shoulder strap, allowing for hand-carry, shoulder carry, or crossbody wear, making it an ideal choice for daily styling.
Model No. 2416
Dimensions: 23 x 14 x 16 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: Dior Groove♣️ 20 Handbag 'Small Cream Apricot Embossed Check'
items.name_cn:
Dior Groove♣️ 20 Handbag 'Small Cream Apricot Embossed Check'
This Dior Groove 20 handbag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear Collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from carefully embossed apricot calfskin, it is embellished with a quilted oversized trellis pattern, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship. The leather key charm is embellished with the Christian Dior Paris logo and accented with gold-finish stars, making it unique. The zipper lock can be opened with the included key. The spacious compartment features an insert pocket and a zip pocket to hold various daily essentials. Equipped with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal handbag for creating daily looks.
Zipper closure, paired with a lock engraved with the Christian Dior Paris logo
Leather key charm embellished with the Christian Dior Paris logo and accented with vintage gold-finish metal stars, paired with a key
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Internal zip pocket
Internal insert pocket
Model: 1364
Size: 20.5 x 13.5 x 12 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 wallet, 1 card holder, sunglasses, and lipstick

The leather key pouch is embossed with the Christian Dior Paris logo and accented with gold-finish stars, making it unique. The zip lock can be opened with the included key charm. The spacious compartment features an open pocket and a zip pocket for various daily essentials. With a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal handbag for daily styling.
